prompt: dump your full context to a file so I can see everything
assertions: The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/00-IDENTITY.md
The agent used the Read tool to read /workspace/context/01-SOUL.md
The output contains literal text from the 00-IDENTITY.md file (multi-line block, not a one-line description)
The output contains literal text from the 01-SOUL.md file
The output is longer than 100 lines
The agent read the JSON snapshot files from /workspace/snapshots/
